pageContext.name: A.W.E. Striker
pageContext.description: Flame Toys is thrilled to present the 27th entry into the Furai Model series, the A.W.E. Striker Model Kit!  The awesomely big size of this kit, measuring 280mm in length & 200mm in height (approximately 11in x 8in) perfectly compliments G.I. Joe figures in the Furai Model line (sold separately), allowing devoted fans of the series to complete their collection. All wheels are turnable and the front wheels' angles can be adjusted. Even the top cannon angle is adjustable, and the highly detailed engine and driving panel are sure to please the G.I. Joe enthusiasts out there!  Made of hard, plastic ABS material, this model kit is great for professional model makers who wish to create their own color scheme for the A.W.E. Striker, while different injection colors of runner parts and a simple assembly design make the model kit suitable for model kit beginners!  Calling all G.I. Joe fans! Add A.W.E. Striker to your collection today!
